creator: mayhem30@gmail.com
text:
I'm surprised this hasn't been reported yet.

This issue has been going on for 24 hours now, and I am unable to update anything on my server until these have been resolved.

$ sudo synth status
Regenerating flavor index: this may take a while ...
Scanning entire ports tree.

culprit: archivers/libunrar5
  Scan aborted because 'make' encounted an error in the Makefile.
  archivers/libunrar5 (return code = 1)

culprit: archivers/libzip
  Scan aborted because 'make' encounted an error in the Makefile.
  archivers/libzip (return code = 1)

culprit: archivers/libarchive
  Scan aborted because 'make' encounted an error in the Makefile.
  archivers/libarchive (return code = 1)
Flavor index generation failed: ports scan
